scripts.d1:query:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "SELECT id, input_kwh, output_kwh, received_at FROM meter_readings ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 10;"
scripts.d1:query:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command "SELECT id, input_kwh, output_kwh, received_at FROM meter_readings ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 10;"
